creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to 04dco from comment #4)

I'll provide configuration files later.

Right away I will say that I'm not using the wizard file, but configuring all separate parts in pjsip.conf manually.

I'm actually binding to specific addresses and not using 0.0.0.0 (should not make a difference)

I noticed that in your pjsip_wizard.conf [user_defaults] or [1001] you have no transport defined. Maybe it's unimportant, but I think it is required.
